title: CobblemonTooltips
description: This adds custom tooltips for items in the mod Cobblemon.
body:
# Poketips - Custom tooltips for Cobblemon

This texture pack adds custom tooltips for items in the Cobblemon mod, this makes it easier to recognise the type of an item. It also is just generally looks better with custom tooltips. 

## Installation
1. Install [Cobblemon](https://modrinth.com/mod/cobblemon), [Legendary Tooltips](https://modrinth.com/mod/legendary-tooltips), and [Iceberg](https://modrinth.com/mod/iceberg).
2. Download the resource pack.
3. Put the resource pack in the resource packs folder.
